Industries

Recycled Fibers for Every Industry

Our processed fibers serve manufacturers across a wide range of sectors, providing sustainable, cost-effective alternatives to virgin materials.

Home / Industries
Markets We Serve

Trusted Across Sectors

From the cars you drive to the buildings you work in, recycled fibers from Fiber Conversion are already part of everyday life.

Automotive

Automotive Manufacturing

The automotive industry is one of the largest consumers of recycled textile fibers. Our processed fibers are used in a wide range of vehicle components, helping manufacturers meet both cost and sustainability targets.

  • Sound insulation and acoustic barriers
  • Trunk liners and floor coverings
  • Seat padding and cushioning materials
  • Door panel insulation
  • Headliners and interior trim components
Request Automotive Fiber Samples
Construction

Building & Insulation

Recycled textile fibers are increasingly used in building insulation products, offering excellent thermal and acoustic properties while diverting waste from landfills. Our fibers help create greener buildings.

  • Thermal insulation batts and rolls
  • Acoustic wall and ceiling panels
  • Underlayment for flooring systems
  • Green building and LEED-eligible materials
  • Blown-in insulation fiber feedstock
Discuss Insulation Fiber Needs
Home Goods

Furniture & Bedding

From mattress padding to sofa cushions, recycled fibers provide the comfort and resilience that furniture and bedding manufacturers need, at a fraction of the cost and environmental impact of virgin materials.

  • Mattress padding and quilting fibers
  • Sofa and cushion stuffing materials
  • Pillow fill and decorative cushion fibers
  • Upholstery padding and interlining
  • Pet bed and accessory filling
Explore Furniture Fibers
Technical Textiles

Nonwovens & Geotextiles

The nonwovens industry relies on consistent, quality fiber inputs. We supply processed fibers for a range of technical textile applications where performance and reliability are critical.

  • Geotextile fabrics for erosion control and soil stabilization
  • Filtration media for air and liquid applications
  • Industrial wipes and absorbent materials
  • Roofing and waterproofing membranes
  • Agricultural landscape fabrics
Inquire About Nonwoven Fibers
Pulp & Paper

Paper & Specialty Products

Cotton and other natural fiber waste can be recycled into feedstock for specialty paper products. We supply clean, processed fiber for paper mills and specialty product manufacturers.

  • Cotton linter fiber for specialty papers
  • Currency and security paper feedstock
  • Fine stationery and art paper fibers
  • Medical and hygiene product fibers
  • Cellulose-based industrial products
Request Paper Fiber Info
General Industrial

Industrial & Commercial Applications

Beyond specific sectors, recycled fibers find use in dozens of industrial and commercial applications. If your process uses fiber, chances are we can supply a recycled alternative.

  • Industrial wiping cloths and rags
  • Oil and chemical absorbent materials
  • Packing and cushioning materials
  • Erosion control blankets and socks
  • Composite material reinforcement fibers
Explore Industrial Solutions

Don't See Your Industry?

We work with manufacturers across many sectors. If you use fibers in your process, we can likely help. Let's talk.

Contact Us

Recycling and processing textile byproducts for industrial use. A New York tradition of sustainability for over a century.
